VALID_COUNTRIES = [
    "US", "CA", "GB", "DE", "FR", "IT", "ES", "NL", "BE", "AT",
    "CH", "SE", "NO", "DK", "FI", "IE", "PT", "GR", "PL", "CZ",
    "HU", "RO", "BG", "HR", "SK", "SI", "LT", "LV", "EE", "LU",
    "MT", "CY", "AU", "NZ", "JP", "KR", "SG", "HK", "TW", "IN",
    "BR", "MX", "AR", "CL", "CO", "PE", "ZA", "EG", "NG", "KE",
]


def filter_valid_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    valid = []
    for order in orders:
        if order["country"] in VALID_COUNTRIES:
            valid.append(order)
    return valid


def validate_users(users: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for user in users:
        if user["country_code"] in VALID_COUNTRIES:
            results.append(user)
    return results


def check_shipments(shipments: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    allowed = []
    for shipment in shipments:
        if shipment["destination"] in VALID_COUNTRIES:
            allowed.append(shipment)
    return allowed
